issue.title: www.joyusgarden.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.joyusgarden.com/bromeliad-care/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.joyusgarden.com%2Fbromeliad-care%2F) ### Comment > Have had occasional issues with breakthrough ads that are usually resolved by restarting AdGuard. That is not working this time, nor are other solutions. ### Screenshots
